models.name: listing-price-estimator
models.description: ML model to estimate fair market price for a vehicle listing based on make, model, year, mileage, condition, and region in Bulgaria.
models.notes: Requires sufficient listing data volume before training. Target: 10,000+ active listings.

models.name: image-quality-scorer
models.description: Scores uploaded listing images for quality (brightness, blur, framing) to encourage better photos.
models.notes: Could use pre-trained model with transfer learning. Low priority until image volume justifies it.

governanceRules.explainability: All models must provide human-readable reasoning for predictions
